register on-chain, donors contribute ETH, admin distributes      matching funds using the quadratic funding formula (sum of sqrt)^2      QF Formula:        match_i = pool \u00d7 (\u03a3\u2c7c \u221adonation\u2c7c\u1d62)\u00b2 / \u03a3\u2096 (\u03a3\u2c7c \u221adonation\u2c7c\u2096)\u00b2      Where j iterates over unique donors to project i. distributeMatching().details: share = (sqrtSum_i / totalSqrtSum)^2 * pool      We scale by 1e9 for integer sqrt precision.

deactivateProject(uint256).notice: Admin can deactivate a project (e.g., for abuse prevention).

distributeMatching().notice: Admin triggers QF matching fund distribution.

registerProject(string,string,string).notice: Register a new project. Caller becomes the recipient.
